title: Evaluation of SnDA: A Novel Data Preprocessing Technique with Theoretical Foundations and Properties
author: RAJESH KUMAR, GAJENDRAN
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
Author Biography:   
  Mr. Rajesh Kumar Gajendran , MS in Statistics, is a Principal Data Scientist with over 15 years of experience in clinical data science and advanced statistical research. His expertise includes adaptive trial design, large-scale data simulation, and regulatory engagement with global authorities including FDA, EMEA, and CDSCO. His work,  “Evaluation of SnDA: A Novel Data Preprocessing Technique with Theoretical Foundations and Properties” , introduces a pioneering framework for structured data normalization and transformation, contributing to modern data science workflows. 
  LinkedIn: www.linkedin.com/in/rajeshkumargajendran

keywords: Arithmetic Progression, Sequential Difference, Data smoothing, Trend Preservation, Noise reduction, Dynamic Range adjustment, Telescopic Range, Telescopic Mean, outlier.
